extension.name: WebHooks
extension.description: A Symphony extension that attaches WebHooks to specific section events for push notifications to a specified URL.

releases.release: - Sym8 2.85.x and PHP 8.5 compatibility - Fixed form field initialization on create screen - Replaced raw section SQL with SectionManager::fetchIDFromHandle() - Use tbl_ table prefix for database portability - utf8mb4 charset for new installations
- Removed dependency on having to install Pager Extension; moved pager library into this extension. - Added Symphony 2.3.x compatibility
